data: {"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"text","delta":"I'll spawn a subagent to handle the frontend changes."}}

{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"tool_use","delta":"{\"name\":\"Agent\",\"id\":\"tc-agent-001\",\"input\":{\"description\":\"Update React components\",\"prompt\":\"Refactor the UserCard component to use hooks\",\"subagent_type\":\"frontend-developer\"}}"}}
{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"text","delta":"The frontend agent is working on the components. Meanwhile, let me check the backend."}}
{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"text","delta":"Found the service. Now spawning a background agent for documentation."}}

{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"tool_use","delta":"{\"name\":\"Task\",\"id\":\"tc-task-003\",\"input\":{\"description\":\"Generate API docs\",\"prompt\":\"Create OpenAPI documentation for the user endpoints\",\"run_in_background\": true}}"}}
{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"contentType":"text","delta":"Documentation agent is running in the background. The main changes are done."}}
